flashcards.front: What is Strong Axiom of Revealed Preference (SARP)?
flashcards.back: Strong Axiom of Revealed Preference (SARP) is a fundamental concept in economics.

flashcards.front: Why is Strong Axiom of Revealed Preference (SARP) important?
flashcards.back: Strong Axiom of Revealed Preference (SARP) is essential for understanding Consumer Theory.
